October 22, 2024 
Be Antibiotics Aware Partner Toolkit: Graphics and Videos 
At a glance 
Be Antibiotics Aware aims to improve antibiotic prescribing and use among target consumer and healthcare professional audiences to protect patient safety and combat antimicrobial resistance. 
Share social media graphics, videos, and PSAs to your organization’s social media accounts and websites. 
Social media visuals 
Post and share these graphics with our sample messages on your social media channels, and on your blogs and websites.
